name: Employer cut my hours after workers comp claim in Murray, is that legal?

mainEntity.name: Employer cut my hours after workers comp claim in Murray, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; document and consult lawyer for protection.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, retaliation for filing workers' comp is illegal in Utah; you have protections.[3] Employers can't fire/demote for valid claims.[3] Key factors: prove timing link; document changes; file complaint with labor dept or lawsuit.[3] Keep records of communications, consult attorney for retaliation claim alongside comp.[3] Protects your job/benefits.

description: Illegal retaliation; document and consult lawyer for protection.[3]
